public/gm-api.js.responsibility: Send GM campaign, campaign deletion, campaign-card metadata, map, and fog-operation append and clear API requests and convert failed responses into client errors.

public/gm-controller.js.responsibility: Coordinate GM campaign library, Player Display URL copy, campaign deletion, campaign-card metadata, encounter gallery, encounter workspace, GM-local map alignment and panning, rectangle Hide and Reveal fog editing, Clear Fog, map, view, and Socket.IO workflows.

public/gm-events.js.responsibility: Translate static and delegated GM campaign, Player Display URL copy, campaign deletion, campaign-card metadata, direct encounter gallery administration, encounter workspace, GM-local map alignment, rectangle Hide and Reveal pointer input, Clear Fog, and map DOM events into controller actions.

public/gm-navigation.js.responsibility: Render explicit GM navigation screen state, informational breadcrumbs, and Back-action visibility across the campaign library, campaign encounter gallery, and encounter workspace.

public/gm-state.js.responsibility: Maintain GM campaign library, current campaign, GM-local selected encounter, explicit client screen state, and per-encounter GM-tab map alignment state.

public/gm-view.js.responsibility: Render the GM campaign card library, Player Display URL sharing, campaign recovery messaging, campaign deletion controls, campaign-card metadata editing, direct encounter gallery administration, encounter workspace shell, GM-local map alignment controls, rectangle Hide and Reveal fog controls, Clear Fog state and confirmation, draft state, messages, status, and shared-canvas map plus semi-transparent fog preview.

public/gm.js.responsibility: Compose and start the browser-native GM client modules.

public/map-canvas.js.responsibility: Render active maps and ordered fog operations on a DPR-aware canvas with contain geometry, reusable fog mask composition, normalized map-rectangle conversion, local zoom and pan, guarded image loading, pointer input, and deterministic cleanup.

public/player.js.responsibility: Coordinate read-only player active-map and opaque fog rendering, connection state, local viewport controls, and player-local fullscreen behavior.

scripts/check-harness-compliance.js.responsibility: Run repository harness validation and report actionable compliance failures.

scripts/check-module-baseline.js.responsibility: Validate the production JavaScript inventory and physical-line ratchet.

scripts/create-dev-cert.js.responsibility: Generate and inspect local HTTPS development certificates.

scripts/harness-compliance.js.responsibility: Validate phase-aware feature evidence, review findings, tracker state, and the closed legacy baseline.

scripts/harness-markdown.js.responsibility: Parse exact governed feature-document, tracker, stage, and Markdown table structures.

scripts/harness-repository.js.responsibility: Discover governed feature records, resolve canonical follow-up links, and coordinate repository validation.

scripts/run-quality.js.responsibility: Run read-only local quality stages in a clear fail-fast order.

scripts/start-local.js.responsibility: Prepare certificates, resolve LAN addresses, and start the local server workflow.

server/campaign-files.js.responsibility: Resolve campaign data-root paths, campaign and map asset paths, directory discovery, atomic JSON writes, and contained map asset realpath checks.

server/campaign-schema.js.responsibility: Normalize and recovery-normalize campaign metadata, maps, and persisted fog operations, serialize supported storage shape, preserve forward-compatible unknown fields, validate campaign metadata patches, and normalize safe campaign and map names.

server/campaign-storage.js.responsibility: Coordinate campaign storage workflows, recovery diagnostics, public storage API methods, map asset mutation transactions, persisted map fog updates, campaign library summaries, and calls into focused schema and filesystem modules.

server/certs.js.responsibility: Resolve and load HTTPS certificate credentials.

server/http-routes.js.responsibility: Register Express middleware, GM and Player Display pages, campaign, map, shown-to-players, persisted fog operation, asset, static-file, and error routes while preserving GM-only mutation guards.

server/index.js.responsibility: Compose campaign storage, state store, HTTP route registration, Socket.IO synchronization, HTTPS credentials, public exports, and local startup guidance.

server/map-image.js.responsibility: Validate supported map image signatures, metadata, and size limits.

server/role-projection.js.responsibility: Classify GM versus player requests from route referers, enforce GM-only HTTP mutations, and project full GM state or read-only shown-to-players map and fog state.

server/socket-sync.js.responsibility: Coordinate Socket.IO connection role assignment, initial state sync, and role-projected state broadcasts.

server/state.js.responsibility: Maintain snapshot-safe active campaign state and encounter-scoped fog operation state, including persisted fog hydration, target validation, atomic fog append, clear, and pruning for removed encounters.
